name: Fantastic Vista
description: Conceals entire landscapes or buildings with massive illusions.

name: Assess Health
description: The Scion can instantly assess the current medical condition of a single living patient in his presence, including damage levels, addictions, illnesses, diseases and genetic defects.

name: Proper Tool
description: Grants all carried items the same environmental immunities as the Scion.

name: Innovate
description: Improves items beyond their original design, temporarily or permanently.

name: Catastarismi
description: Transforms beings into constellations or restores them.

name: Astronomer’s Eye
description: Grants bonus dice to knowledge and prophecy rolls while stars are visible.

name: Avatar of Innovation (The Creator)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes the embodiment of creation itself.

name: Cornucopia
description: Causes dead plant matter to produce edible food.

name: Keen Blade
description: Sharpens a bladed weapon, granting Piercing or bonus damage for a duration based on successes.

name: Punish the Line
description: Curses the descendants of a guilty target with a fitting permanent affliction.

name: Ghost Control
description: Grants near-total dominion over a ghost via a memento harvested from its corpse.

name: Eclipse Halo
description: Blinds anyone who looks at the Scion for actions equal to Legend.

name: Nighty-Night
description: Forces nearby lower-Legend beings into sleep or shared dreams.

name: Safely Interred
description: The Scion cannot be crushed or suffocated by earth or rubble, though starvation or thirst remain possible.

name: Nocturnal Director
description: Rewrites a sleeping target’s dreams for hours per success.

name: Sonic Blast
description: Creates a devastating sonic shockwave causing lethal damage and deafness.

name: Howl of the Banshee
description: A terrifying scream inflicting unsoakable lethal damage on those who hear it.

name: Confer Knack
description: The Scion grants a mortal one Epic Stamina Knack temporarily.

name: Avatar of Earth (The Shaper)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes The Shaper, master of earth and stone.

name: Avatar of Fire (The Devourer)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes the Devourer, an apocalyptic avatar of consuming flame.

name: Ymir’s Hand
description: The Scion blankets miles in supernatural cold for a full day.

name: Blessing of Health / Curse of Frailty
description: Restores or removes reproductive capability and may bless or curse unborn children. Each additional condition increases difficulty by 1. Duration is one year per success.

name: Jury Rig
description: Restores destroyed equipment with penalties reduced by successes.

name: Toxic Thorn
description: Grows a poisonous thorn that delivers customizable toxins.

name: Shadow Bodies
description: Creates semi-solid shadow duplicates that act in coordination. Duplicates are immune to bashing but vulnerable to lethal damage.

name: Greenskin
description: Grants plant-like traits, extra soak, photosynthesis, and immunity to bleeding.

name: Full Moon
description: Exerts full-moon effects on environment, Virtues, tides, and other Purviews.

name: Shadow Refuge
description: The Scion hides within a shadow large enough to contain him. Mundane detection fails automatically; supernatural detection is contested.

name: Afraid of the Dark
description: The target experiences a moment of terrifying darkness and loses one Willpower. Ineffective against higher-Legend targets; others may resist.

name: Heart of Darkness
description: Inverts a target’s Virtues. Duration and permanence depend on relative Legend. Can be resisted.

name: Blizzard Call
description: The Scion summons and shapes massive cold, snow and ice over a wide area.

name: Salvation Sacrifice
description: The God redirects damage from a protected target onto himself.

name: Volume
description: Increases or decreases sound volume in a wide radius, potentially causing damage or deafness.

name: Eternal Bloom
description: Grants plants eternal life within a defined area.

name: Dreams Come True
description: Creates objects or beings directly from dreams.

name: Bacchanalia
description: Creates a hedonistic revel affecting all within radius. Duration equals total Chaos Boons. Afterward, affected lose all Willpower and recover at half rate for a week.

name: Create Animal
description: The Scion creates mundane animals from his blood. Without Legend they last one scene; spending Legend grants physical permanence based on size units.

name: Inferno
description: The Scion ignites an area into bonfire-intensity flames for minutes equal to Legend; victims may escape with contested rolls.

name: Winter’s Mercy
description: Extends Frost Immunity to others for one scene per Legend.

name: Corpse Oracle
description: Commands a corpse, ghost, or undead to answer questions truthfully, one per three successes.

name: Impossible Hybrid
description: Creates viable plant hybrids that cannot exist naturally.

name: Lateral Prognostication
description: Grants a vision in the form 'If you do A, result will be B', providing future-oriented solutions to narrative blocks.

name: Sympathy Pains
description: Links damage between multiple targets; damage ignores soak. If one dies, others die unless they escape the link.

name: Property Infusion
description: Swaps physical properties between materials.

name: Eclipse
description: Creates massive supernatural darkness over miles. Not reduced by sunlight; lasts hours equal to successes.

name: Heart’s Shackle
description: Imposes a long-lasting or permanent emotional condition, potentially fatal to low-Legend mortals.

name: Tornado Tamer
description: Creates and controls a personal tornado with Epic Strength, capable of movement, attacks and carrying the Scion.

name: Exorcism
description: Expels ghosts from hosts, banishes them from the World, or repels groups of ghosts.

name: Voice of Fate
description: Allows the Scion to transmit Prophecy Boons to mortal oracles or followers across any distance.

name: Human Hybrid
description: Creates grotesque or cross-species human hybrids, raising their Legend by 1.

name: Shaping
description: Allows sculpting of stone, metal, or earth as if it were clay.

name: Bless or Blight
description: Blesses land against blight or curses it with devastating infestation.

name: Astral Beast
description: Summons a loyal constellation-beast for a limited duration.

name: Krueger’s Blades
description: Dream injuries become real physical wounds.

name: Danger Sense
description: Adds bonus dice equal to highest Prophecy Boon when rolling Join Battle or Perception + Awareness to detect surprise or traps.

name: Object of Desire
description: Makes the target the focus of a powerful shared emotion for the scene.

name: Seismic Disruption
description: Triggers devastating earthquakes with effects based on successes.

name: Weather Husbandry
description: Allows full control and micromanagement of weather over miles, including environmental damage.

name: Water Vortex
description: Creates controllable whirlpool or waterspout.

name: Flame Travel
description: The Scion travels instantly between large fires in line of sight or affected by Bolster Fire.

name: Battle Map
description: Creates real-time tactical battlefield map.

name: Starfire
description: Envelops the Scion in stellar flame dealing aggravated damage.

name: Eye of the Storm
description: When the Scion is caught in a chaotic situation unrelated to her, she may activate this Boon to become an island of calm. Environmental hazards, stampeding crowds, debris and similar dangers fail to touch her as long as she does not actively involve herself. Normal environmental movement penalties still apply.

name: Absorb Light
description: The Scion absorbs all light, gaining Stealth bonuses and immunity to Sun Purview effects from lower-Legend sources. Lasts one scene.

name: Burn
description: Body radiates heat for one scene; touching Scion inflicts lethal damage equal to Legend.

name: Self Diagnosis
description: For the remainder of the scene, the Scion may use Health Boons on herself without changing their costs or dice pools.

name: Fool’s Gold
description: Makes objects appear to be something else of similar size and nature.

name: Emotional Awareness
description: Allows the Scion to perceive a chosen emotion in others and probe its depth, cause and focus.

name: Warning Line
description: The Scion draws a mystical line that alerts her when specific beings cross it.

name: Mermaid’s Kiss
description: Grants Water Breathing to others for 24 hours.

name: Sky’s Grace
description: The Scion takes no damage from falls of any height or may double jump distance. May mitigate knockback by spending Legend to halt movement mid-air.

name: Bleak Census
description: Determines whether a named individual is dead and may answer questions about their death or afterlife.

name: Social Disease
description: Creates a contagious emotional state that spreads to all who encounter the initial victim.

name: Fire Immunity
description: The Scion takes no damage from fire, suffers no smoke inhalation, and extreme heat is harmless. Immunity applies regardless of fuel but does not protect clothing or items except the Birthright used to channel the Boon.

name: Potability
description: Makes a small body of water safe to drink.

name: The Subtle Knife
description: Makes small items unobtrusive and ignored unless used overtly. Observers may resist.

name: Shadow Plunder
description: Steals a target’s shadow, penalizing their social rolls while empowering the Scion socially for the duration.

name: Polphony
description: Allows multiple simultaneous speeches or conversations in a scene.

name: Natural Camouflage
description: Renders the Scion nearly impossible to detect in natural environments.

name: Avatar of Fertility (The Green)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes The Green, absolute master of plant life.

name: Sanctify Oath
description: Sanctifies oaths; breaking them causes automatic botches equal to threshold successes.

name: Phase Body
description: Makes parts of body intangible, subtracting successes from enemy attacks.

name: Holy Font / Epidemic
description: As Heal/Infect, but affects up to Legend × 3 targets per activation.

name: Chaos Theory
description: Entropy works against the target, inflicting a cumulative −1 dice penalty on every action they take. The effect ends when the penalty equals the target’s Legend.

name: Blazing Weapon
description: The Scion forms a melee weapon of fire or enhances an existing weapon with flaming traits for one scene, assigning traits based on Legend. Deals lethal damage and ignites flammables.

name: Work Harder
description: Reduces fatigue penalties for extended labor.

name: Open Underworld Portal
description: Opens a one-way portal to the Underworld, allowing followers to pass through.

name: Protean Understanding
description: All Animal Boons apply to all animals. This Boon is passive and permanently expands all Animal capabilities.

name: Blessing of Ammunition
description: Grants weapons unlimited ammunition temporarily or permanently.

name: Watcher at the Threshold
description: The Scion teleports to a Warning Line when it is crossed.

name: Paralyzing Confusion
description: The victim’s rational thoughts dissolve into chaotic noise. On success, the target is frozen, unable to think, speak or act, unaware of surroundings. Duration equals successes; memory for an equal time before activation is erased. Does not affect targets with higher Legend. Equal Legend targets contest with (Willpower + Integrity + Legend).

name: Flamin’ Bullets
description: The Scion imbues a projectile weapon’s ammunition with fire, granting +1 Accuracy and Damage, lethal damage, ignition, and leaving no evidence.

name: Flare Missile
description: Creates ammunition of sunlight adding Legend damage, lethal, Piercing.

name: Shadow Mask
description: The Scion cloaks his face in shadow, becoming unrecognizable to humans and electronics. Lasts up to 24 hours and is not dispersed by light.

name: Water Breathing
description: Allows breathing water and immunity to temperature extremes.

name: Safe Haven
description: Declares a city-sized location under divine protection, functioning as a permanent Vigil Brand.

name: Avatar of the Sun
description: Transforms into solar avatar for one scene with overwhelming divine effects.

name: Animal Aspect
description: By meditating for one action on a token representing his animal, the Scion adopts a metaphorical characteristic associated with it. The bonus dice equal successes rolled and apply to the Attribute most closely tied to that trait. Duration lasts one action per Legend spent.

name: Hybrid Chimera
description: The Scion blends incompatible animals into fertile hybrids using ichor. Costs vary based on hybrid complexity.

name: To Everything There Is a Season
description: Ages or regresses a living being temporarily by age categories.

name: Restore / Wither
description: Instantly restores limbs or inflicts aggravated damage with withering effects.

name: Baelfyr
description: When activated with another Fire Boon, all damage from that Boon becomes aggravated.

name: Plague / Cure
description: Creates or eradicates diseases entirely, with mechanics based on successes.

name: Wind’s Freedom
description: Grants true three-dimensional movement (flight) for the scene. Ends if the enabling Birthright is lost.

name: Shadow Shroud
description: Creates an area of supernatural darkness. Only Night Eyes can see within. Sunlight slowly dissipates the effect.

name: Verdant Creation
description: Creates living plants from nothing that survive for a year.

name: Guilt Apparitions
description: Accused guilty target suffers recurring hallucinations, cannot regain Willpower. Lasts days equal to successes or until confession or amends.

name: Minor Visions
description: Once per session, the Storyteller provides a Minor Vision concerning a future scene. Visions are always true and precise unless thwarted by a being with Legend. If no vision is given, the Scion may request one at session end.

name: Fixit
description: Repairs damaged equipment instantly, restoring health levels.

name: Unlikely Pattern
description: Thrown items assemble into a desired form. Difficulty varies by complexity. Even successes produce flawless results; odd successes introduce flaws. Permanence requires sacrificing permanent Willpower.

name: Forespeak Destruction
description: Reveals a target’s fatal flaw and allows the Scion to force Virtue extremities or terror reactions based on relative Legend.

name: Dormant Memory
description: Reawakens the spirit of dead plant matter, causing rapid regrowth.

name: Summon Ghost
description: Summons a named ghost instantly to the Scion’s presence unless it resists successfully.

name: Penetrating Glare
description: Allows the Scion to see clearly through smoke, fog, murky water (if immersed), translucent barriers, and dim light down to candlelight. Does not function in total darkness.

name: Blessing of Bravery
description: Grants Willpower and temporary Valor to allies who hear it.

name: Poltergeist Beacon
description: Marks a target as a beacon for hostile spirits, imposing distraction penalties for weeks equal to threshold successes.

name: Purify Water
description: Purges all impurities from massive volumes of water.

name: Ifrit
description: The God transforms willing mortals into living beings of flame for days equal to successes.

name: Insanity
description: Overwhelms victims with pure chaos. Mortals go permanently insane; higher-Legend beings suffer temporary madness based on threshold successes. Does not affect mindless or already insane targets.

name: Irresistible Impulse
description: Creates a powerful emotional surge in a target, granting bonuses and penalties based on the induced emotion.

name: Earth Creation
description: Creates earth, stone, or metal from nothing.

name: Oubliette
description: Throws a clinched opponent into a void realm of darkness. Retrieval requires additional Legend expenditure.

name: Strike Dead / Deny Death
description: Instantly kills a living target or returns a recently dead corpse to life under strict limits.

name: System Failure
description: All nearby machines catastrophically fail within a large radius. Mundane machines break automatically; magical ones must be overcome individually. Repair requires exceeding activation successes.

name: Mother’s Touch
description: Allows the Scion to physically grapple and damage ghosts for one scene.

name: Star Chamber
description: Fate engineers karmic punishment proportional to crimes. Contestable by higher Legend.

name: Avatar of Death (The Reaper)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes The Reaper, a terrifying avatar of death capable of slaying Gods and Titans.

name: Chill the Blood
description: The target suffers Dexterity loss and slower actions for the rest of the scene.

name: Shambling Horde
description: Raises multiple zombies at once under unified control.

name: Spirit Lamp
description: Makes Scion a beacon to spirits; grants bonuses in the Underworld.

name: Walk The Dream
description: Allows travel through the Dream World and entry into others’ dreams.

name: Cooling Tempers
description: Forces those affected to spend Willpower to initiate violence until they break free.

name: The Best Trick
description: Creates an illusion so real it temporarily becomes reality.

name: Night Eyes
description: Darkness no longer imposes visibility penalties. The Scion sees in pitch blackness, though colors are lost. Does not allow sight through physical barriers.

name: Daybreak
description: Forces sunrise or zenith; restores Willpower to most beings; penalizes Darkness, Sky and Stars Boons.

name: Slumber Cage
description: Traps a dreamer within their own dream or grants total control of the dream.

name: Bleach
description: Inflicts lethal sunburn damage equal to Legend in radius; can combine with Burn.

name: Intoxicate / Detoxify
description: Simulates intoxication or purges it entirely. Does not affect poisons.

name: Ward
description: The Scion bars specific threats from entering a warded area.

name: Shadow Boxer
description: Forces a target to attack themselves using their own Strength. Does not affect higher-Legend targets.

name: Epic Enhancement
description: Enhances animals beyond natural limits, increasing Attributes, Epic Attributes or size. Each animal may only be enhanced once, but multiple upgrades may be purchased at once.

name: Siege Juggernaut
description: Turns attacks into siege-scale strikes for one scene.

name: Don’t Fear the Reaper
description: Either grants allies serenity and Willpower or strips a target of fear of death, forcing Berserker Fury.

name: Perfect Timing
description: Always knows exact time and senses supernatural temporal distortions over distance.

name: Ride Animal
resistance: Animal Intelligence (× Legend modifier for Nemean)
description: The Scion overwhelms an animal’s mind and controls its body for the scene. Works like Horse, but applies to animals. Birthright creatures may allow possession freely.

name: Liquid Form
description: Transforms body into living water with extensive immunities and movement.

name: Read the Ranks
description: Reveals enemy strategy, supply and commander stats unless resisted.

name: The Sleeper (Avatar of Dream)
description: Transforms the Scion into the Dormant Avatar whose dreams reshape reality.

name: Cloud Body
description: Transforms the Scion into living cloud, immune to physical damage but unable to exert physical force directly.

name: Ríastrad
description: Triggers warpspasm activating multiple Boons/Knacks with extreme combat effects.

name: Bolster
description: For each success, one target gains one temporary health level for the remainder of the scene. These levels do not overflow into normal damage.

name: Judgment
description: Determines whether an accused target is guilty of a specific injustice. Success gives a true reading; failure is indeterminate for 24 hours; botch gives false reading. Not contested or modified.

name: Battle Cry
description: Inflicts dice penalties on enemy attacks for duration based on Legend.

name: Green Thumb
description: Allows plants to survive indefinitely without water, sunlight, or nutrients.

name: Law & Order
description: Reduces or nullifies Chaos Boon effects by subtracting successes.

name: Appropriated Vigil
description: A God monitors Vigil Brands placed by his Scions or Fatebound.

name: None Shall Pass
description: Allows reflexive counterattacks against those who attempt to pass or attack protected targets.

name: Lucky Star
description: Grants automatic successes for a chosen Ability for one week.

name: None Shall Pass
description: The Scion locks down an area against supernatural travel.

name: Banish
description: Target is barred from a specified area; scale and duration depend on successes.

name: The Night Watch
description: The Scion keeps watch all night without fatigue, gaining Legend bonus successes and immunity to surprise.

name: Shadow Craft
description: Allows reshaping shadows or creating solid shadow objects. Objects function normally and last based on Legend or scene duration.

name: Rust / Shine
description: Causes metal to rust or restores it to pristine condition.

name: Divine Threnody
description: Dampens or amplifies sound, carries voices on the wind, or produces sonic effects. Does not function without air.

name: Command the Soul
description: Temporarily enslaves undead creatures to obey the Scion’s commands.

name: Celestial Estate
description: Grants ownership of a private divine estate in outer space.

name: Where Are You?
description: Determines distance and direction of remote contact origin.

name: Changing States
description: Changes water between liquid, ice, steam or fog.

name: Confer Immunity
description: The Scion grants a mortal an elemental immunity for years equal to Legend.

name: Avatar of Health (The Savior / The Scourge)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes an avatar of perfect healing or absolute pestilence.

name: Smoking Mirror
description: Shows bird’s-eye view of surrounding terrain in miles equal to Legend; unusable at new moon.

name: Earth Body
description: Transforms the Scion into living stone or metal, granting immense durability.

name: Appropriated Threshold
description: A God monitors Warning Lines placed by his Scions or Fatebound.

name: Avatar of Animal (The Beast)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes a primordial apex predator. Animals obey absolutely; The Beast is unstoppable, unseen in ambush, and invulnerable to mortal weapons.

name: Hellfire
description: For the scene, all Fire Boons that deal damage inflict aggravated damage.

name: Hippocratic Oath / Vow of Pestilence
description: Permanently aligns the Scion with healing or pestilence, granting major bonuses and severe restrictions.

name: Animal Feature
description: The Scion alters his anatomy to gain animal traits such as wings, claws, armor or climbing surfaces. Total bonuses cannot exceed Legend. Multiple features may be taken per activation based on successes.

name: Unquiet Corpse
description: Raises a corpse as a mindless zombie under the Scion’s control until destroyed or the Scion dies.

name: The Beast Within
description: The Scion permanently incorporates a metaphysical trait of her totem animal, gaining permanent bonus dice to a chosen Attribute equal to its rating. This Attribute may no longer be enhanced by Animal Aspect. This Boon may only be taken once.

name: Spaceworthy
description: Grants immunity to vacuum and selected stellar radiation types.

name: It’s A Wonderful Life
description: Reveals plot developments that would occur without the Scion’s involvement, exposing hidden threats and plans.

name: Heal / Infect
description: Heals or inflicts bashing or lethal damage. Each target may only be affected once per day.

name: Anticipation
description: Allows the Scion to undo and change an action after seeing its outcome.

name: Bolster Fire
description: The Scion removes the need for fuel and oxygen from a visible flame up to campfire size for one scene, or creates a candle-sized flame from nothing. The flame cannot cause combat damage but can ignite materials.

name: Inexorable Gravity
description: Creates inescapable gravitational pull affecting movement, knockback and orbit.

name: Perun’s Apples
description: Creates and directs ball lightning causing aggravated damage in an area with lingering effects.

name: Shield of Righteousness
description: Negates a single unjust action that would harm an innocent person. Scion must be present; target must be innocent.

name: Root of the Mountain
description: The Scion becomes immovable while standing on earth, immune to knockback and knockdown.

name: Twist Plants
description: Reshapes plant life into bindings, shelters, or misleading terrain.

name: Resilience
description: Targets heal at twice the normal rate for days (Legendary) or years (mortals) equal to successes. Does not stack with other healing modifiers.

name: Scarlet Letter
description: Marks guilty target visibly for years equal to Legend; may be made permanent by sacrificing Willpower.

name: Music of the Spheres
description: Allows the Scion to hear cosmic harmony and gain bonus dice for the scene.

name: Salve
description: Shuts off pain and allows use of dying boxes as normal health levels for one scene, with lethal risk.

name: Magma Control
description: Grants immunity to lava and allows its manipulation as a weapon.

name: Hrimthurssar’s Touch
description: The Scion’s touch radiates killing cold, adding bashing or lethal damage and freezing objects.

name: Masterful Vector
description: Allows precise control over area attacks from devices or Relics.

name: Echolocation
description: Allows perfect navigation in darkness via sound waves; fails in vacuum or Silence.

name: Frozen Fortress
description: Creates walls of solid ice that persist based on environmental conditions.

name: Avatar of Darkness (The Abyss)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes The Abyss, extinguishing light and hope, blinding mortals and unnerving even Titans.

name: Silver Blessing
description: Grants an item the properties of silver for the scene.

name: Intellectual Property
description: Erases a fact from common knowledge, storing it as a secret.

name: Cloak of Stars
description: Creates a stellar cloak granting immunity or DV bonuses against attacks.

name: Shadow Boxer
description: The target’s shadow attacks them directly, dealing unavoidable bashing damage equal to successes.

name: Faunaphagia
description: The Scion eats meat from the appropriate animal and absorbs its essence. Successes indicate Ability dots borrowed (up to the animal’s rating, max total 5). Borrowed Abilities last for the rest of the scene.

name: Grant Eternal Youth
description: Grants eternal youth; removal causes rapid aging, often fatal.

name: Blessing of Insight
description: Adds War Boons as automatic successes to Join Battle.

name: Banner Bearer
description: Followers gain automatic successes and DV bonuses while Scion is visible.

name: Heart On My Sleeve
description: Publicly expresses a genuine emotion, granting Willpower changes and bonus dice to the Scion for emotion-aligned actions.

name: Instant Riot
description: On success, a riot erupts. Five people per success become violent and destructive. Riot lasts hours equal to the Scion’s Legend. Participants lose all Willpower for the following week.

name: Hearth’s Glow
description: Creates a hearth aura that protects against cold and restores Willpower to those who remain within the area.

name: Create Air
description: Creates breathable air or releases explosive gusts of wind over a wide area.

name: Van Winkle’s Boon
description: Grants extra health levels while sleeping, at the cost of temporary Legend on waking.

name: Feel It in the Wind
description: Extends Perception and Awareness senses to miles equal to activation successes.

name: Strike Blind
description: Blinds targets by revealing the depths of darkness. Duration depends on relative Legend; mortals are blinded permanently.

name: Divine Enforcement
description: Grants complete knowledge of written laws and supernatural enforcement authority.

name: Come Running
description: The Scion instantly appears at the side of a Vigil Branded charge in danger.

name: Heatstroke
description: Inflicts fatigue penalties as if exposed to extreme heat; −2 to all dice pools for hours equal to Sun Boons. Max twice per target.

name: Water Mastery
description: Full manipulation of water, applying Strength through it.

name: Portent
description: Allows glimpses of past and future via the stars, aiding prophecy.

name: Labyrinthine Lingering
description: Creates supernatural disorientation at an intersection. All who enter lose sense of direction and exit randomly unless touching the Scion. Mortals have no defense; others may resist. Does not affect higher-Legend targets.

name: Crawling Chaos
description: A transmissible version of Paralyzing Confusion. Effects last one hour per Legend and spread to observers. Only equal or higher Legend characters may resist.

name: Army of One
description: Creates multiple duplicates acting in coordination for one scene.

name: Hornet’s Nest
description: On a successful activation roll, the Storyteller reveals in general terms what single action will either maximize chaos or defuse it in the current scene. The Storyteller explains which action leads to which outcome, not the reasoning behind it.

name: Virility / Muliebrity
description: Guarantees conception in the next eligible sexual encounter. Supernatural beings resist.

name: Dreams Made Flesh
description: Pulls physical objects from dreams into reality.

name: Aurora
description: Surrounds the Scion in cosmic light, increasing Dodge and Parry DVs.

name: Friend or Foe
description: Determines whether a newly met character is destined to be a friend or enemy, granting permanent mechanical bonuses accordingly.

name: Loaned Identity
description: Disguises people, creatures or objects as something else, regardless of size.

name: Siren’s Song
description: Compels listeners to approach and remain near the Scion.

name: Tidal Interference
description: Inflicts DV penalties on close-combat foes equal to Legend spent.

name: Halo of Fire
description: The Scion wreathes himself in flame for a scene, dealing extra lethal damage on contact or grapples; Fire Immunity negates the effect.

name: Ageless
description: Character ceases physical aging at current age and becomes immune to Age Category changes.

name: Avatar of Illusion (The Trickster)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes the ultimate embodiment of deception.

name: Avatar of Guardian (The Sentinel)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes the Sentinel, the ultimate protector.

name: Erode
description: Ages inanimate objects, reducing Hardness and causing malfunctions.

name: Accelerate Growth
description: Dramatically accelerates plant growth over large areas.

name: Hotter Than Hot
description: For one scene, the God’s Fire Boons ignore Fire Immunity and affect even fire-based beings.

name: Fire in the Belly
description: Temporarily increases Virtues for a day.

name: Avatar of Stars (The Crown)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes a cosmic sovereign of the heavens.

name: Co-Location
description: Allows the God to exist in multiple places simultaneously.

name: Intuitive Adaptation
description: Extends Fundamental bonuses to all technological tasks for the scene.

name: Prince of Lies
description: Makes the Scion immune to supernatural lie detection and coercive oaths.

name: Lightning Rod
description: Grants Electrical Immunity to another being for 24 hours.

name: Levin Fury
description: Calls down or launches lightning bolts dealing massive lethal damage and knockback; can be parried by similar Boons.

name: Solar Prominence
description: Disrupts electronic signals in radius for seconds equal to Legend; area moves with Scion.

name: Gaia’s Touch
description: Allows movement through plants without leaving a trace and grants visions from plant spirits.

name: Foretelling the Messiah
description: Declares a chosen PC or NPC as destined to solve a problem, granting automatic successes on a future roll. Only one Messiah may exist at a time.

name: Slipped From Dreams
description: Reality partially transforms into dream logic for a scene.

name: Uller’s Stride
description: The Scion glides on ice and snow, gaining movement bonuses and never losing traction.

name: Lingering Malaise
description: Makes wounds or illness nearly incurable. Permanent for mortals unless rescinded.

name: Human Clay
description: Reshapes mortal flesh within human limits. Each success alters one feature.

name: Missive
description: Sends a short message to an attuned target regardless of distance.

name: Knotted Heartstrings
description: Imposes a precisely defined emotion on a target for days, with mechanical bonuses and penalties.

name: Shooting Star
description: Hurls a meteor from the heavens dealing massive lethal damage.

name: Create Water
description: Creates fresh or salt water from hands.

name: Circle of Life
description: Allows the Scion to regrow herself from a planted seed after death.

name: Rain of Fire
description: The God calls down a storm of fiery projectiles over a massive area, inflicting repeated lethal damage.

name: System Failure
description: Causes catastrophic failure of entire systems, including mechanical, digital, or social structures. Repair follows Sabot rules.

name: Guilt of the Damned
description: Target with lower Legend automatically, or contested otherwise, suffers −1 to all Virtues for the scene.

name: Frozen Moment
description: Removes targets from time for minutes equal to successes.

name: False Pretenses
description: Allows the Scion to assume any appearance or object, regardless of size.

name: Is This Real Life?
description: Regains Willpower when actions cause others to question reality versus dream.

name: All-Seeing Eye
description: Grants double successes to pierce concealment, lies, illusions; Willpower dot refunded when ended.

name: Control Fire
description: The God shapes and commands large volumes of fire in three dimensions, creating fiery constructs for one scene.

name: Animal Communication
description: The Scion can understand and make himself understood by an animal as he speaks his native language and the animal responds with its own postures, scents and/or vocalizations. This Boon doesn’t make animals smart, calm or loyal, but most are curious enough about having a person address them that they’ll hear a Scion out before defaulting to aggression, panic or indifference.

name: Life-Giving Rays
description: Halves healing times for living beings in range for hours equal to successes; ends if new damage is taken.

name: Death Senses
description: The Scion can see and perceive ghosts even when they have not manifested. She may also determine the general cause of death of a corpse, receiving a conclusive but generic answer unaffected by misleading evidence.

name: Earth Travel
description: Allows movement through earth like swimming, subject to suffocation limits.

name: Attunement
description: Creates a sympathetic vibration allowing targeting of attuned subjects at any distance unless Silence intervenes.

name: Fluid Motion
description: Negates underwater penalties; causes penalties on land until ended.

name: Quicksand
description: Creates deadly quicksand that immobilizes and can suffocate victims.

name: Desiccate
description: Inflicts lethal damage by draining bodily water.

name: Animal Command
description: The Scion spends one Willpower and names one task that the animal must perform. The task cannot seem suicidal or impossible to the animal, but the animal cannot balk at an order that doesn’t immediately seem so. Orders may describe a single immediate action or one conditional task. Without Animal Communication, commands are delivered only via simple nonverbal signals.

name: Negative Prophecy
description: Declares that a specific outcome will not occur, massively increasing difficulty for anyone attempting to cause it.

name: Unbarred Entry
description: Step through solid barriers as a simple action.

name: Morale Failure
description: Prevents enemy troops from attacking Scion-led forces.

name: Fire’s Eye
description: The Scion may see through any fire within line of sight or affected by Bolster Fire, replacing his normal vision. He cannot hear through the fire.

name: Dreamcraft
description: Creates hallucinations affecting multiple senses as long as the Scion concentrates.

name: Work Smarter
description: Doubles efficiency on repetitive manual tasks for one scene.

name: Natural Army
description: The Scion transforms into multiple animals of his chosen type (minimum 50). All share a hive mind. Reversion is possible if at least one body remains alive and conscious.

name: Terra Incognita
description: Guides Scion to mythic realms, Touchstones, and realm entrances.

name: Animal Form
description: The Scion transforms into a mundane specimen of his chosen animal. Physical Attributes become the animal’s; Mental Attributes remain his own. Immune to Animal Command and Ride Animal.

name: Colossus Armor
description: Summons giant armor granting massive Strength, soak and size.

name: Mortal Stroke
description: Weapon inflicts aggravated damage on next hit.

name: Unseen Shield
description: The Scion projects a powerful invisible barrier for one scene.

name: Wilderness Eyes
description: For the rest of the scene, the Scion may perceive through the senses of all specimens of her totem animal within an area of one mile per success. She may focus on one animal at a time unless she possesses Parallel Attention. Animals may be compelled to search for a specific target.

name: Death of the Soul
description: Temporarily severs a divine being from all divine power, rendering them mortal.

name: Stasis
description: God enters temporal stasis until declared conditions occur.

name: Rainbow Bridge
description: Teleports long distances within the World.

name: Landslide
description: Reshapes massive volumes of earth over a wide area for one scene.

name: Entreat Immunity
description: The Scion binds a specific substance or item to permanently protect a target.

name: More Than Lucid
description: Allows the Scion to enter lucid dreaming at will and defend against dream intrusion.

name: Sonorous Creation
description: Creates sounds or voices directly from the mind with complexity based on successes.

name: Unintended Purpose
description: Allows an object to function as a different mundane object of similar size. Duration equals successes in days; permanence requires permanent Willpower.

name: Cleanse
description: Instantly ends blight or infestation affecting plants.

name: Shuck Fate
description: Transfers newly formed Fatebindings onto another character. Requires contested rolls and additional Legend expenditure. The Scion still suffers the final Fatebinding roll.

name: Lullaby
description: Sings targets to sleep, restoring Willpower and healing bashing damage.

name: Hidden Name
description: Prevents supernatural detection or redirects it to another target.

name: Cynosure
description: Designates a personal Pole Star, always revealing distance and direction to it.

name: If I Had a Hammer
description: Produces a needed small item from a pocket if available.

name: Sabot
description: The Scion mentally destroys a complex machine. Success causes immediate breakdown. Repair requires accumulating successes equal to the original roll on an extended (Dexterity + Craft). Cannot affect simple machines or those crafted by higher-Legend characters.

name: Otherworldly Portal
description: Opens portals between World, Overworld, Underworld, and Terra Incognita.

name: Flash Freeze
description: The Scion freezes a creature or object instantly, often shattering it.

name: Still Object
description: Freezes an object in space-time for minutes equal to Legend; supernatural force can move it.

name: Devil Body
description: The Scion becomes a humanoid pillar of flame for one scene, dealing automatic lethal damage on touch and gaining damage absorption.

name: Earth Armor
description: Forms armor from earth with soak and hardness equal to half the Scion’s Legend.

name: Frost Immunity
description: The Scion is immune to cold, ice, freezing wind and water, and never slips on ice.

name: Water Control
description: Allows limited manipulation of liquid water touching the Scion.

name: Weather Witch
description: Allows prediction of natural weather days in advance equal to successes, over a large area based on Legend. Negates penalties from lesser weather effects.

name: Out of the Frying Pan
description: The Scion and willing targets teleport to a random destination determined by a die roll, ranging from safety to extreme danger.

name: Lunacy
description: Inflicts Virtue Extremities on multiple targets; resisted by equal or higher Legend.

name: Quench
description: The Scion extinguishes all non-magical fires within a radius equal to successes in yards, or suppresses spreading flames created by Fire Boons.

name: Psychic Prison
description: Imprisons target in a subjective years-long mental incarceration; causes permanent Attribute loss.

name: Vigil Brand
description: The Scion brands a person, object or place and senses when it is in danger.

name: Divine Pass
description: The Scion is recognized as a lawful protector and waved past security unless acting maliciously.

name: Drown
description: Causes lungs to fill with fluid over time.

name: Euthanasia
description: The Scion may painlessly end the life of an incapacitated being suffering from lethal or aggravated wounds or terminal illness. It cannot affect unwilling Scions.

name: Fundamental
description: Adds automatic successes equal to Innovation Boons on Craft or Science rolls.

name: Recurring Distraction
description: Those who hear the Scion are plagued by a recurring inane thought. Resisted by (Willpower + Integrity + Legend). Failure imposes distraction penalties equal to Legend spent for 24 hours.

name: Paper Tiger
description: The Scion conjures animals from artistic representations. Creatures emerge from the artwork and last for the scene or until killed.

name: Haunted Mists
description: Creates mist that traps ghosts in physical form within an area for the scene.

name: Stolen Face
description: Creates a supernaturally convincing disguise or false identity for a scene.

name: Avatar of Sky (The Storm)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes a vast storm avatar capable of devastating mortals, cities and Titans.

name: Rejuvenation
description: While in direct sunlight, heals 1 bashing or lethal level per hour, up to total Sun Boons. Ends if sunlight is lost. Daytime only; artificial light does not count.

name: Friendly Fire
description: Redirects a ranged attack to strike an ally of the attacker or the attacker themselves. The target may resist with Willpower + Integrity + Legend.

name: Antidote
description: Purges mundane toxins or diseases instantly; magical afflictions require exceeding original Toxicity or successes.

name: Echo Sounding
description: Reveals subterranean composition, voids, or specific buried objects within a wide radius.

name: Cloud Sculptor
description: Allows sculpting and shaping of existing clouds in the sky.

name: Avatar of Sound (The Dissonance / The Harmony)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes an avatar of destructive dissonance or perfect harmony.

name: Read Between the Minds
description: Allows discovery of deeply buried or subconscious emotions and secrets.

name: Sense Age
description: Touch reveals object age; extra successes reveal additional historical ages.

name: Storm Augmentation
description: Augments attacks with lightning or wind, doubling knockback and potentially stunning targets.

name: Cosmic Perspective
description: Blesses or curses targets with cosmic detachment or insignificance.

name: Imprisoning Crystal
description: Encases a target in crystal stasis, immune to harm until released.

name: Fury of War
description: Grants bonus dice for attacks and intimidation; restricts non-violent actions.

name: Endless Season
description: Locks an area into a single season for years or longer.

name: Night Terror
description: Opponents must overcome the activation roll to attack or use supernatural powers against the Scion for the rest of the scene.

name: Divine Brilliance
description: Creates daylight aura cancelling Darkness effects and penalizing Stars Boons.

name: Tragedy of Melpomene
description: Inflicts crushing supernatural depression on targets based on Willpower.

name: Search For A Sign
description: After 10 minutes of divination, chooses the better of two named courses of action. Successes become reserve bonus dice usable in future scenes while following that path, limited by Legend.

name: Avatar of Chaos (The Void)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes The Void, an embodiment of annihilating chaos that drives mortals mad, warps reality and unnerves even Titans.

name: I Say Thee Nay!
description: The Scion becomes immovable in defense of a charge, gaining DV and resistance bonuses.

name: Come Along
description: Allows others to accompany Psychopomp travel Boons.

name: Sun Chariot
description: Summons flying solar chariot during day; lasts until sundown. Failure causes loss of control.

name: Shadow Step
description: Step instantly from one shadow to another within line of sight without interrupting actions.

name: Divine Radiance
description: Emits sunlight for one scene or produces a focused burst causing −2 distraction penalty, igniting objects, or scorching surfaces.

name: Dream Wrack
description: Victim relives their crime nightly, loses all Willpower, cannot regain it for days equal to Scion’s Legend. Contestable by higher Legend.

name: Incinerate
description: Burns a target from within, inflicting unsoakable lethal damage equal to successes.

name: Divine Resolve
description: The God grants bonus successes to resist supernatural coercion.

name: Consequence
description: Reveals the immediate outcome of a contemplated action.

name: Blackout
description: Extinguishes all mundane light sources in an area of 20 meters per success, excluding supernatural light.

name: Twist Time
description: Speeds or slows time around targets, altering Speed, DV, movement and timing.

name: Call of the Pack
description: A cry audible for miles that alerts all beings with Legend to the Scion’s location.

name: Electrical Immunity
description: Grants lethal and bashing soak against electrical damage equal to threshold successes for one scene. By spending an additional Legend, half the successes apply as aggravated soak.

name: Avatar of Prophecy (The Wyrd)
description: Transforms the Scion into the living embodiment of Fate itself.

name: Warrior Ideal
description: Imposes penalties on enemies attacking the Scion.

name: Warden of the Walls
description: The Scion becomes the divine protector of an entire city.

name: Frozen Panoply
description: The Scion conjures weapons, armor or structures of ice that last a scene.

name: Overworld Judgment
description: Imposes a divine law compelling obedience from lower or equal Legend beings.

name: Avatar of Frost (The Cold)
description: For one scene, the Scion becomes the Cold, freezing everything it touches.

name: Unerring Orientation
description: Always knows direction and distance to known locations or home.

name: Creation
description: Creates items or even souls from raw materials, scaling with successes.

name: Control Aging
description: Accelerates or decelerates aging of mortals based on Legend spent and successes rolled.

name: Dreamworld
description: Traps targets in a complete dream reality resolved via social contests.

name: Still Person
description: Increases action speed and reduces Dexterity of a visible target for scene.

name: Cradlesong
description: Puts targets to sleep for hours equal to Legend. Higher-Legend targets resist.

name: Delay Rot
description: By touch, the Scion halts decay in a corpse or rot-susceptible object for days equal to threshold successes. The effect may be reapplied and does not cause delayed putrefaction.

name: Aegis
description: The Scion grants temporary Hardness to a person or object for 24 hours.

name: Purifying Flame
description: The Scion burns away magical curses from willing targets, removing effects at the cost of aggravated damage.

name: Phase Cloak
description: Renders parts of body invisible based on moon phase; grants Stealth bonuses.

name: Aetheric Awareness
description: Senses breaches between worlds and details of past crossings.

name: Call of the Wild
description: The Scion calls all animals of her chosen type within a radius in miles equal to successes rolled. Animals travel toward her until dismissed or they arrive, remaining nearby unless threatened.

name: Parallax
description: Allows perfect distance judgment and distorts perceived distance for others.

name: Silence
description: Creates a zone where all sound-based effects are nullified except for the user.

name: Heavenly Flare
description: Blinds or distracts targets in line of sight; resisted by Stamina + Fortitude. Extras auto-fail.

name: Wind Grapple
description: Allows the Scion to grapple opponents with gusts of wind as if performing a clinch.

name: Frozen Soul
description: Hardens the Scion’s soul, adding difficulty to supernatural effects targeting her mind.

name: Martyrdom
description: Heals a target by transferring damage to the Scion; damage is unsoakable.

name: Eternal Repentance
description: Condemns a criminal to punishment even after death, enforceable in the Underworld.

name: Frozen Heart
description: The Scion suppresses a target’s emotions, Virtues and Willpower temporarily.

name: Persistent Echo
description: The Scion is surrounded by indecipherable white noise that prevents all spoken communication. The effect lasts for the scene, follows the Scion, and may be resisted by an opposed (Perception + Awareness) roll.
